Description.SourceString:
If you thought the mixed grill was a monumental mountain of meat, then the mixed platter makes it seem like a molehill. Thick and juicy steak, mixed with other delicious meat dishes.

Garou would regularly make dishes such as this. Mountains of meat, crafted from their latest hunts. They would flavour the dish with local herbs, and perhaps threaten it with a vegetable once in a while.
